name: node-resolve
title: node-resolve
description:
Synchronous/Asynchronous require.resolve() algorithm
This module implements the node require.resolve() algorithm such
that you can require.resolve() on behalf of a file asynchronously
and synchronously
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-resolve because Synchronous/Asynchronous require.resolve() algorithm.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-resolve as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-resolve with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-resolve --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
